news.headline: Norwegian police arrest Chinese woman on spying allegations
news.summary:
Authorities in Norway arrested a Chinese citizen on espionage allegations on Thursday in connection with a purported effort to set up a receiver to collect sensitive satellite data, the country’s domestic intelligence service said.
Norwegian security officials also searched two premises in connectio

news.headline: UK elections: Conservatives are stuck between a rock and a hard place
news.summary: Stuck between a rock and a hard place.Université Paris Nanterre's Nicolas Jara-Joly tells #F24Debate #Tories are struggling to find their own voice, caught between far-right #Reform and centre-left #Labour ➡️https://f24.my/BuFe
